title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. majalis
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. majalis, also known as Arctic Eyebright, is a subspecies of the Eyebright plant, a flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating eye problems such as conjunctivitis and blepharitis, as well as other health issues like respiratory infections and digestive issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. majalis include reducing inflammation, improving eye health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically as an eye wash or compress to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
